sentences.text: Hans felt sad because the basket was big, and he needed flowers for the market.
The Miller said, 'I gave you my wheelbarrow, so I want flowers.'
He said, 'True friendship is not selfish, I think.'
Hans said, 'My dear friend, you can have all my flowers.'
